question.label: What to push on
question.name: What feels worth pushing on right now?
question.description: Growth-fitted opener. Surfaces what the report is actively choosing to develop, not what's drifting.

answer: I want to move from just shipping screens to owning a whole product area. I keep getting pulled into pixel polish when I'd rather be shaping the direction with PM and eng earlier.

assessment.note: Sam names a concrete growth direction — owning a whole product area and shaping direction earlier with PM and engineering — showing strong ambition and active investment.

new_queue.label: Own product area
new_queue.name: Owning a whole product area — what would you be doing differently week to week?

new_queue.label: Current footing
new_queue.name: What's feeling solid in your design work right now, Sam?

new_queue.label: Growth blockers
new_queue.name: What's in your way of getting to the next level — not what's missing, what's actively blocking?

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs ahead
new_queue.name: What would you need to trade off to take on a bigger design scope?

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: What is the first concrete step you want to take before we talk again?
